Hiring Manager  
[Company's Name]  
[Company's Address]  
[City, State, ZIP Code]  

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the AI Researcher position within the Research & Development department at [Company's Name]. My name is Michael Brown, and I am thrilled about the opportunity to join your esteemed organization.

With a strong background in artificial intelligence, I am excited to contribute cutting-edge research to the R&D department. My enthusiasm for advancing AI technologies aligns perfectly with the innovative environment at [Company's Name], where I hope to help drive groundbreaking projects and initiatives.

I appreciate your consideration of my application, and I am eager to bring my expertise and passion for AI to your team. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can contribute to the exceptional work being done at your company.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown

goldAnswers.Cover Letter: With a strong background in artificial intelligence, I am excited to contribute cutting-edge research to the R&D department.
